common_names_val: Gold Shower, Thryallis, Rain of Gold, Shower of Gold
variety_val: Galphimia glauca (standard yelகுறைவு), Galphimia gracilis (smaller form)
growth_habit_val: Dense, rounded பசுமைமாறா புதர் with upright கிளைing; naturally compact form
leaves_val: Opposite, simple, ovate to elliptic, 3–7 செ.மீ long, glaucous blue-green with smooth margins
flowers_val: Bright golden-yelகுறைவு, 1.5–2 செ.மீ diameter, 5 clawed petals in terminal racemes 10–20 செ.மீ long
flower_char_val: Star-shaped with 5 yelகுறைவு petals and prominent red-tipped stamens; petals drop cleanly creating a golden shower effect
fruit_val: Small 3-lobed capsule, 5–8 மி.மீ diameter, splitting into 3 segments when ripe
seed_char_val: Small, smooth, brown விதைகள்; one per capsule segment; மிதமான viability
root_system_val: மிதமானly deep, fibrous வேர் syதண்டு; வறட்சி-adapted
climate_val: வெப்பமண்டல to துணை வெப்பமண்டல; பனி-sensitive; USDA zones 9–11
temp_range_val: 18–38°C ideal; tolerates brief cold to −2°C; damaged beகுறைவு −4°C
rainfall_val: 500–1500 மி.மீ ஓராண்டுly; அதிகம்ly வறட்சி-tolerant once established
soil_type_val: நல்ல வடிகால் sandy, களிமண், or rocky மண்; tolerates poor மண்s
sun_req_val: முழு சூரிய ஒளி (6+ hours daily); blooms best in முழு சூரிய ஒளி
spacing_val: 1–1.5 மீட்டர் between plants; closer for hedge planting (60–90 செ.மீ)
irrigation_val: சொட்டு நீர்ப்பாசனம் or hand நீர்ing; minimal once established
water_req_val: குறைவு to மிதமான; very வறட்சி-tolerant once established
can_pots_val: ஆம், in large containers (20+ liters) with excellent drainage
fert_schedule_val: Light feeding 2–3 times ஆண்டுக்கு (spring, suமி.மீer, early autumn)
organic_fert_val: கம்போஸ்ட், sகுறைவு-release balanced உரம், bone meal
organic_pest_val: வேப்ப எண்ணெய் or insecticidal soap if scale or whitefly appear
mulching_val: Light இயற்கை மல்ச் (5 செ.மீ) to conserve moisture; இல்லைt strictly necessary
training_val: Naturally compact; can be shaped as formal hedge, informal screen, or specimen புதர்
pruning_time_val: Late winter or early spring before new growth; light shaping anytime
how_prune_val: Cut back by one-third to maintain shape; remove dead or crossing கிளைes; tolerates hard கத்தரித்தல் for rejuvenation
common_pests_val: Scale insects, whiteflies, occasional caterpillars; generally very பூச்சி-free
common_diseases_val: வேர் rot in நீர்logged மண், இலை spot in humid conditions; generally நோய்-resistant
disease_prev_val: Ensure excellent drainage, avoid overநீர்ing, provide good air circulation
flowering_months_val: Year-round in வெப்பமண்டல காலநிலைs; spring through autumn in துணை வெப்பமண்டல regions
fruiting_season_val: Continuously folகுறைவுing பூing; small capsules form throughout the year
days_harvest_val: Ornamental; பூs enjoyed on the plant; cut தண்டுs last 5–7 days in vase
harvest_ind_val: பூs fully open with bright yelகுறைவு color; petals drop cleanly when spent
avg_yield_val: Hundreds of பூ clusters per season; continuous blooming
poll_notes_val: Bees are primary pollinators; பூs produce oil instead of nectar, collected by specialized oil-collecting bees
commercial_val: Mexico, Central America, Southern United States (Florida, Texas), இந்தியா, தென்கிழக்கு ஆசியா
market_uses_val: Landscape ornamental, hedge plant, container plant, butterfly garden specimen
processing_val: மூலிகைal medicine preparations (Galphimia extract); ornamental nursery trade
market_value_val: ₹150–400 per plant (nursery); widely available in வெப்பமண்டல nurseries
trad_medicine_val: Used in traditional Mexican medicine (calderona amarilla) for treating anxiety, allergies, and asthma for centuries
active_compounds_val: Contains galphimines (இல்லைr-seco-triterpenes), particularly galphimine-B with anxiolytic properties
anxiety_val: Galphimine-B has been clinically studied and shown to have anxiolytic effects comparable to lorazepam without sedation
antiinflam_val: Extracts show anti-allergic and anti-inflaமி.மீatory activity; used traditionally for hay fever and respiratory allergies
immune_val: Traditional use for respiratory conditions; பூ and இலை extracts used in மூலிகைal preparations
